issues.title: Seller estate still in probate
issues.description: The seller died without a will, so the estate must complete probate before ownership cleanup can fully proceed.
issues.next_action: Follow up with realtor on probate status and expected heir action timeline.

issues.title: Lien release still required from heirs
issues.description: The land cannot be sold while the lien remains in place; heirs must sign the release after probate resolution.
issues.next_action: Confirm which heirs must sign and what paperwork is still missing.

issues.title: Wrong parcel carried Susan's name and taxes
issues.description: The appraisal district placed Susan's name on a different twenty-acre parcel, creating years of taxes paid against land that was not intended to be theirs.
issues.next_action: Document the mistaken parcel history and confirm whether any refund, release, or quiet-title risk remains.

issues.title: Adjacent-lot acquisition opportunity
issues.description: A company bought nearby lots and is trying to flip them. One adjoining parcel is strategically important because Chuck and Susan do not want a neighbor building directly above them.
issues.next_action: Identify parcel number, seller, and asking price for the adjoining lot.
